site.title: A Little Question For You
site.footer_text: made with courage, code & a little bit of chaos

proposal.title: Will you go on a date with me?
proposal.subtitle: I promise it will be worth saying yes.
dodge_messages: That button is a little shy!
Are you sure you found the right button?

surprise.title: WAIT, YOU ACTUALLY SAID YES?? 😭
surprise.subtitle: I was so ready for you to say no 😅

confirmation.title: Glad you didn't say no.
confirmation.message_template: Be ready by {time} on {date} — I'm coming to get you!
confirmation.postscript: P.S. Normal people text. I made a whole website for you. No big deal.

fee.title: one small fee
fee.description: To confirm your acceptance of this date, please complete the following totally normal transaction.
fee.fine_print: one-time fee • completely fictional • absolutely worth it

finale.title: It's officially a date!
finale.subtitle: Screenshot this page. I can't wait to see you.
